gnss_i2c_init.message0: GNSS module init I2C mode address 0x20
gnss_i2c_init.tooltip: Initialize GNSS BeiDou positioning module using I2C mode

gnss_hs_init.message0: GNSS module init Hardware Serial %1 RX(Green) %2 TX(Blue) %3
gnss_hs_init.tooltip: Initialize GNSS BeiDou positioning module using hardware serial

gnss_ss_init.message0: GNSS module init Software Serial %1 RX(Green) %2 TX(Blue) %3
gnss_ss_init.tooltip: Initialize GNSS BeiDou positioning module using software serial

gnss_read_data.message0: GNSS read data once and save result
gnss_read_data.tooltip: Read GNSS data and save to internal variables

gnss_get_utc_date.tooltip: Get UTC date from GNSS data

gnss_get_utc_time.tooltip: Get UTC time from GNSS data

gnss_get_location.tooltip: Get positioning information from GNSS data
